text.title: Agile Ceremonies Setup Decision Tree
text.summary: Decision tree mapping config state to a rule.

decision-tree.root-question: Does every ceremony have a published purpose?

branch.when: purpose_missing == false AND timebox_missing == false AND retro_actions_missing == true

conclusion.verdict: enforce ≥1 retro action with owner + due-date

branch.when: purpose_missing == false AND timebox_missing == false AND retro_actions_missing == false AND overhead_high == true

conclusion.verdict: retune time-boxes; merge or trim ceremonies

branch.when: purpose_missing == false AND timebox_missing == false AND retro_actions_missing == false AND overhead_high == false AND attendees_open == true

conclusion.verdict: bound attendees; move others to optional

branch.when: purpose_missing == false AND timebox_missing == false AND retro_actions_missing == false AND overhead_high == false AND attendees_open == false

conclusion.verdict: preconditions not met; route to correct methodology or skip.

text.example: purpose_missing=false, timebox_missing=false, retro_actions_missing=false, overhead_high=false, attendees_open=false → accept config.
